sections.paragraph:
a locust (from גָּבָה which see), Nah 3:17 pl. (or collect.) גֹּובַי and גּבַי (for גֹּובִים Lehrg. p. 523), Amo 7:1 Nah 3:17, גֹּוב גֹּובַי “the locust of locusts,” of a great abundance of them. Chald. גֹּובָא, גּוּבָּא, גֹּובַי; pl. גֹּובָאֵי.

גוב

(“pit”), [Gob], pr.n. of a place otherwise unknown, where David fought with the Philistines, 2Sa 21:18, 19 2Sa 21:19.
